events.title: Exxon Mobil reaches best available historical close
events.summary: Exxon Mobil reached its best available historical closing price of USD 171.47.
events.stockLayerLesson: A best-ever price can signal strong momentum, but future returns still depend on valuation, earnings delivery and expectations.

events.title: Exxon Mobil added to StockLayer coverage
events.summary: Exxon Mobil is now included in StockLayer's market data, risk and company tracking layer.
events.stockLayerLesson: Energy companies are judged by commodity cycles, capital discipline, geopolitical risk and the durability of cash generation.
